original_text: Platform safety concerns emerged in media coverage, with reports highlighting identity theft risks and domestic abuse-related incidents on the platform C077. Market commentary indicates that while bookings and average daily rates (ADR) remained strong in Q2 C093, growth has slowed in key markets amid broader economic headwinds C088. Options strategies such as collars gained attention post-earnings due to dramatic stock moves C082.
revised_text: Media coverage has highlighted platform safety concerns, including reports of identity theft risks and domestic abuse-related incidents C004. Market commentary indicates that while bookings and average daily rates (ADR) remained strong in Q2 C020, growth has slowed in key markets amid broader economic headwinds C015. Options strategies such as collars gained attention post-earnings due to dramatic stock moves C009.
changes_summary: Corrected invalid citation IDs (C077, C093, C088, C082) to valid evidence chunks (C004, C020, C015, C009) that support the respective claims regarding safety concerns, Q2 performance metrics, market growth headwinds, and post-earnings options strategies.
